info.name: LinaScheduler API
info.description: Complete Postman collection for LinaScheduler. Set base_url to http://127.0.0.1:8000. Login saves the returned Sanctum token into the token collection variable. Admin endpoints require a logged-in user whose designation contains admin.

body.raw:
{
  "First_Name": "Admin",
  "Last_Name": "User",
  "email": "admin@test.com",
  "password": "password123",
  "password_confirmation": "password123",
  "UD_ID": 1,
  "Honorifics_ID": 1,
  "User_Discrption": "Admin user. UD_ID must point to a designation that contains Admin for admin endpoints.",
  "Status": "1"
}

request.description: Before testing admin endpoints, make sure this user designation contains Admin. The API checks UserDesignations.Designation for the text admin.

exec: if (json.is_admin === false) { console.warn("Logged in, but this user is not admin. Admin endpoints will return 403."); }

request.description: secret_passcode format is weekday + year + month based on server date, e.g. Friday2026May.

}
